name: Cheesecake Cookies 2
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped walnuts or toasted sesame seeds or roasted sunflower seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together the flour, sugar, and butter with a pastry cutter to make a crumbly texture.
2. Mix in 1/2 cup nuts or seeds. Reserve 1/2 cup of the mixture for the topping, and press the remainder into an 8-inch square pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes.
4. In the meantime, soften the cream cheese and blend in the honey, egg, milk, remaining ingredients.
5. Spread over the baked crust and sprinkle with the reserved topping.
6. Garnish, if desired, with fruit slices (orange, apple, banana) or nuts (almonds, walnuts, Brazil nuts).
7. Bake at 350°F for an additional 25 minutes.
8. Cool and cut into 2-inch squares.
Note: If using strawberries for garnish, place them on the cheesecake topping after baking.
